Hero.subtitle: Real-time GPS, remote tachograph and documents — all in one system. Built for transporters in BiH, Serbia and the wider region.
Hero.imageLabel: [ PHOTO — Hero shot · truck on open road / dispatcher screen ]

items.note: Every vehicle's position in real time

items.label: Average onboarding
items.note: From signed contract to live operations

items.note: Tachograph and HOS by the book

BeforeAfter.title: Operations without spreadsheets and manual reports.
BeforeAfter.subtitle: Five tools, paper trails and WhatsApp threads — collapsed into one system. No data copying.
before: Tachograph downloaded manually at the depot
Documents scattered across emails and folders
You learn about fines only when an inspector arrives
Cost per vehicle calculated after the fact
Driver calls dispatch for every route change
after: DDD files pulled remotely on schedule
All documentation in one repository with alerts
Cost per km, driver and route in real time
Driver sees route changes in the app immediately

HowItWorks.title: Six modules. One system.
HowItWorks.subtitle: Starter covers GPS, routing, service and telematics. Professional adds the full tachograph stack and documents. All in one window, in 4 languages.

steps.title: Real-time GPS
steps.body: Each vehicle's position refreshed under 5 seconds, with full route history. Vehicle, driver and current route in the same window.
steps.image: [ PHOTO — Dispatcher in front of the Groute control panel ]

steps.title: Tachograph & DDD
steps.body: Automatic DDD download schedule per vehicle. Driver activity under EU 561/2006 shown live, one-click inspection reports.
steps.image: [ PHOTO — Tachograph device in a truck cabin ]

steps.title: Compliance & alerts
steps.body: Warnings before driver cards, registrations, technical inspections and licenses expire. Audit log with signature and date.
steps.image: [ PHOTO — Driver with a tablet / documents ]

steps.title: Route optimization
steps.body: Route proposals with fuel-cost, driving-time and per-vehicle-type restriction estimates. Road incidents and closures factored in automatically.
bullets: Restrictions per vehicle type built in

steps.title: Service & maintenance
steps.body: Service-interval tracking per vehicle and reminders before deadlines — no surprise breakdowns.
steps.image: [ PHOTO — Service record and control cards ]

steps.title: Vehicle telematics
steps.body: Fuel consumption and vehicle data in one console. Cost per km, driver and route.
bullets: Sensors, trailer data and indicators in real time
steps.image: [ PHOTO — Driver and dashboard with telematics data ]

FunctionBadges.title: Six modules. One platform.
FunctionBadges.subtitle: Starter covers GPS, routing, service and telematics. Professional adds the full tachograph stack and documents. All in one window, in 4 languages.

items.title: Real-time GPS
items.body: Each vehicle's position refreshed under 30 seconds, with full route history.

items.title: Tachograph & DDD
items.body: Remote DDD downloads on your schedule, driving-time analysis and inspection-ready reports.

items.title: Compliance & alerts
items.body: Warnings before driver cards, registrations, technical inspections and licenses expire.

items.title: Route optimization
items.body: Route proposals with fuel-cost, driving-time and driver-card deadline estimates.

items.title: Service & maintenance
items.body: Service-interval tracking per vehicle, reminders before deadlines and cost evidence.

items.title: Vehicle telematics
items.body: Fuel consumption, driving style per driver and vehicle data in one console.

OperativaBlock.body: Dispatcher has all route data in the console. Trip orders, CMR and tachograph files linked to the route — without re-keying between systems.
OperativaBlock.imageLabel: [ PHOTO — Driver in truck cabin with the Groute app ]

Hardware.titleB: A proven device for your fleet.
Hardware.body: A small device installed in the truck that sends every signal from the vehicle straight into the Groute console. You see where the trucks are, how much fuel they burn and whether everything is fine — without driving to the depot, without paper.

benefits.title: Stable signal wherever the truck goes
benefits.body: The device picks the strongest available network on its own. No blank spots on the map, even on remote rural stretches.

benefits.title: Tachograph and vehicle data — automatic
benefits.body: Tachograph files, speed, fuel and kilometers travelled stream directly into the Groute console. No manual transfers into Excel.

benefits.title: Built for the working conditions
benefits.body: Engineered for vibration, dust, rain and cabin extremes. No failures after the first summer or winter.

benefits.title: Vehicles shown exactly where they are
benefits.body: Precise positioning across the whole route from the Balkans to the EU — through borders and tunnels alike.

Hardware.noteTitle: The device is a one-time purchase and stays your property.
Hardware.noteBody: The initial data plan ships with the device — top-ups are on Groute.

ForWho.titleB: From five to five hundred vehicles.
ForWho.subtitle: We work with small family hauliers the same as with logistics centres and bus operators. The platform adapts to the fleet — not the other way around.

featured.title: Transport operators
featured.body: Trucks and tractor units, domestic and international distribution. Focus on tachograph compliance, fuel optimization and cutting empty kilometres.
featured.footerBody: Tachograph, fuel and empty kilometres — solved in one place.
featured.imageLabel: [ PHOTO — Tractor unit on an international route ]

small.title: Logistics centres
small.body: Mixed fleets and multiple terminals. Dispatchers and operations teams coordinating arrivals, loads and deliveries in real time.

small.title: Bus operators
small.body: Scheduled and tourist passenger transport across borders. Tracking vehicles, drivers, cards and driving hours per EU regulation.

FuelSavings.eyebrow: Fuel — biggest line on the invoice
FuelSavings.subtitle: Fuel is 30–40% of route cost. Groute reads consumption straight from the vehicle, ties it to driver and route, and shows where the money leaks.
FuelSavings.heroBody: Drag the sliders to match your fleet. Numbers update live based on the −6% pilot result.
FuelSavings.disclaimer: Pilot result; actual savings depend on routes, drivers and fuel price.

cards.title: Real-time L/100 km
cards.body: Consumption per vehicle, per driver, per route. Sortable leaderboard — best driver versus worst, in litres.

cards.title: Idle-fuel waste
cards.body: Engine on, truck not moving — fuel burned for nothing. Daily idle minutes per vehicle, flagged when over threshold.

cards.title: Cost per km and per route
cards.body: Fuel price × consumption × distance, attached to every trip. Pre-departure estimate vs. actual at arrival.

cards.title: Empty-km reduction
cards.body: Route optimization cuts 8.3% of empty kilometres in pilot — kilometres you never paid for fuel to drive.

Compliance.title: One avoided fine pays for Groute for a year.
Compliance.subtitle: Tachograph violations are no joke. Groute monitors HOS rules live and warns before an inspector pulls the vehicle over — prevention, not reaction.
Compliance.tableNote: Estimates — verify with the relevant authorities when contracting.

Bento.title: The power of the Groute platform
Bento.subtitle: Every tool a fleet manager needs — connected into one command dashboard, with no switching between systems.
Bento.gpsBody: Each vehicle's position refreshed under 5 seconds. Speed, heading and full route history by driver and vehicle.
Bento.langBody: Interface, documentation and support in Serbian, Bosnian, English and German.
Bento.speedBody: Five times faster admin work compared to manual tachograph handling and Excel records.
Bento.alertsBody: Notifications before document expiry and HOS violations.

Onboarding.subtitle: From signature to operations — no weeks of waiting on devices, no consulting projects. If it slips past 8 days, it escalates to priority.

Pilot.body: We install up to 2 vehicles, set up the platform, monitor for 30 days. If we don't deliver measurable ROI, we refund the deposit — no questions asked.
benefits: Guaranteed measurable ROI in the pilot
No long-term contract — cancel any time

Faq.title: Questions we hear every day.
Faq.subtitle: Can't find an answer? Write us — we reply the same day.

items.a: We don't publish prices on the site — it depends on fleet size and the chosen package. Send a request and we return a personalised quote within 24 hours.
The target is full onboarding under 5 business days. Installation per vehicle takes about 3 hours — our subcontractors work on the ground in BiH and Serbia.

items.q: What if we're not happy during the pilot?
items.a: We refund the €100 deposit per device fully, no questions asked. The pilot is 30 days, up to 2 vehicles, with free installation.

items.q: Do you work with small fleets?
items.a: We work with fleets of every size — from a single vehicle to several hundred. Get in touch and we'll tailor a package to your fleet.
Teltonika FMC650 (heavy vehicles), FMC150 (light vehicles) and FMC234 (trailers). Devices are bought once and remain the client's property.
Yes. Groute is a GDPR data processor. The client owns their data and can export it at any moment.

items.q: Which languages does the platform support?
items.a: Interface and support in Serbian, Bosnian, English and German. Contracts and documentation in the language of your choice.

Cta.body: We show the platform live on your operations and prepare a savings estimate tailored to your fleet size and transport type.

tags.label: We don't sign on the call

Footer.tagline: Groute was founded to take fleet operations to the next level. We unify route planning, tachograph and document flow into one platform — built for hauliers in the Balkans.
